message:
feat(cli,indexer): add --source flag for cross-source disambiguation and fix infinite-OOM-loop on killed incremental scans

CLI (lib.rs):
- Add --source / --source-id flag to View, Export, ExportHtml, and
  Expand commands so users can disambiguate sessions when the same file
  path exists across multiple indexed sources (e.g., 'local' vs
  'work-laptop'). The source_id is threaded into run_view, run_export,
  run_export_html, and run_expand alongside the existing db path.

Indexer (mod.rs):
- Fix infinite-OOM-loop: when the streaming consumer performs an
  incremental commit, persist scan_start_ts to the storage layer so
  that if the process is subsequently killed (OOM or otherwise), the
  next run starts a delta scan from the last committed checkpoint
  instead of re-scanning from the beginning and hitting the same OOM
- Thread scan_start_ts through run_streaming_index and
  run_streaming_index_with_connector_factories down to the consumer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
